laneLabelNote: 27B is the second dense scale target after Gemma 4 31B per the Qwen north-star checklist. Linear-attention (DeltaNet SSM) layers in the manifest are out of this fixture's scope; smoke config carries the named blocker. This pin covers the full-attention layer pattern only.
purpose: Pin the canonical bundle for Qwen 3.6 27B full-attention layer-block real-weight parity. Parallels config/gemma-4-31b-real-weight-fixture.json. Every hash below pins the Qwen program so the parity harness rejects fixture drift at validate-time.

manifest.sha256Note: Pinned by bench/tools/audit_qwen_3_6_27b_smoke_contract.py at audit time. Null today; updater script writes the live hash into this slot. The audit's smokeConfigHash is the canonical reading.

graph.regenerationNote: host-plan.json is regeneration output, gitignored under bench/out/. Materialize with `runtime/zig/zig-out/bin/doe-csl-host-plan-tool --input runtime/zig/examples/execution-v1/qwen-3-6-27b-smoke.json --bundle-root bench/out/r3-2-27b-manifest-fullgraph-compile-steps --mode steps`; aggregate_qwen_3_6_27b_truncated_decode_compile_attempt.py records the live hash.

modelShape.note: Manifest-shape Qwen 3.6 27B: head_dim=256, hidden=5120, GQA 24:4. Layer pattern is linear_attention x3 then full_attention every 4 layers. This fixture covers the 16 full-attention layers only; the 48 linear-attention layers are explicit named blockers in the smoke config.

embed_tokens.tileNote: Embedding table; resolves the smoke config's embed_tokens step.

layer.0.self_attn.q_proj.tileNote: GQA query projection (24 heads * head_dim=256 = 6144). Q4_K-quantized for matmul_q4k decode path; bf16 for prefill matmul.

layer.0.self_attn.q_norm.tileNote: Per-head Q norm scale. queryKeyNorm path.

layer.0.self_attn.k_norm.tileNote: Per-head K norm scale. queryKeyNorm path.

layer.0.mlp.gate_proj.tileNote: SwiGLU FFN gate projection. Feeds the gate input of silu_gated.

layer.0.mlp.up_proj.tileNote: SwiGLU FFN up projection. Feeds the input of silu_gated.

layer.0.mlp.down_proj.tileNote: SwiGLU FFN down projection. Reduces back to hidden.

weightsDir.contract: Tile per layer per module under weightTileMap. Manifest-shape file sizes (bytes) follow shapeValues * elemSize(dtype). Validator cross-checks file sizes against modelShape via bench/tools/audit_qwen_3_6_27b_smoke_contract.py --pin config/qwen-3-6-27b-real-weight-fixture.json.
weightsDir.expectedWeightSetSha256Note: Pinned when an HF-derived extractor lands. Null today; the smoke-contract audit reports per-tile presence without verifying byte content.
weightsDir.extractorNote: Future tool: load HF Qwen 3.6 27B safetensors, slice per layer per module per weightTileMap, q4k-quantize where dtype=q4k, write per-tile files into weightsDir. Then this fixture's expectedWeightSetSha256 can be pinned.

scopeRestrictionsCarryOver.carryOverNote: These are lifted from runtime/zig/examples/execution-v1/qwen-3-6-27b-smoke.json scopeRestrictions. The audit's smoke-contract verdict treats the wiring-landed entries as advisory — the smoke config's plain `silu` and dropped `o_gate` are still contract-valid until the rebind lands.
